name: Lupa
description: AI-native veterinary OS replacing 7+ point solutions
investors: Singular, firstminute capital
thesis: Massive TAM in underdigitised $350B pet care market. 50x revenue growth seed to A. Regulatory complexity in veterinary creates defensible moat.

name: Wexler
description: AI fact intelligence for complex litigation
investors: Pear VC, Seedcamp, Myriad Venture Partners, The LegalTech Fund
thesis: AI fact intelligence for litigation. Same category as Harvey ($8B valuation, Sequoia-led) — Wexler is earlier stage with differentiated approach to litigation fact intelligence vs Harvey's broad legal platform

name: La Fraise
description: AI agents automating dental practice admin workflows
investors: Seedcamp, 20VC, Kima Ventures
thesis: AI agents automating dental admin in underdigitised French dental market. All five founders ex-Doctolib. 1,200+ dentist users, 30K+ treatments facilitated, 250 new practitioners/month.

name: Pure Poker
description: Zero-rake real-money poker with gaming-native monetisation
investors: Z Fellows, Triumph Arcade CEO, Point72 & A-Star (evaluating)
thesis: Gaming-native monetisation (battle passes, skins, AI coaching) in regulated wagering. Compliance moat via CLEAR/Radar/PayPal/Apple Pay. Legal in 30+ states under skill-based classification. $8M balance sheet, 6-person team, ~$50M seed valuation. chess.com-for-poker thesis.

name: Didero
description: AI agents automating enterprise procurement for manufacturers
investors: Chemistry, Headline, M12 (Microsoft)
thesis: Agentic AI for supply chain procurement. 30+ customers. Integrates into existing ERP/email. $10T global procurement market

name: Nixtla
description: Time series foundation model for forecasting and anomaly detection
investors: Energize Capital, True Ventures, GreatPoint Ventures
thesis: TimeGPT — first production-ready foundation model for time series. 45M+ downloads. Microsoft, Zalando, Decathlon customers

name: Accrual
description: AI-native tax preparation and review platform for accounting firms
investors: General Catalyst, Pruven Capital, Edward Jones Ventures
thesis: AI replacing manual accounting workflows. H&R Block, Armanino customers. 85% reduction in prep time. Ex-Stripe/Brex founders

name: Avantos
description: AI operating system for financial services client onboarding and servicing
investors: Bessemer, Guardian Life, SEI, Vanguard, Mercer Advisors
thesis: AI-native OS for wealth management, insurance, retirement. Mercer Advisors ($96B AUM) customer. Knowledge graph architecture

name: Complyance
description: AI agents for governance, risk & compliance
investors: GV (Google Ventures), Speedinvest, Everywhere Ventures
thesis: 16 purpose-built agents automating manual GRC workflows. Enterprise-grade. GV-backed at Series A.

name: Cogent Security
description: AI taskforce for autonomous vulnerability management
investors: Bain Capital Ventures, Greylock, OpenAI angels
thesis: AI agents for full vulnerability lifecycle — detect, prioritise, remediate. Fortune 500 clients. 97% reduction in critical risk exposure. Greylock Edge incubated (same program as Palo Alto Networks)

name: Purple Transform
description: AI video analytics for rail safety and critical infrastructure
investors: Mercia Ventures, Sure Valley Ventures
thesis: SiYtE platform across 900+ cameras. Trespass detection, suicide prevention. Expanding to ports & CNI.

name: Vizgard
description: Edge-based visual AI for defence and surveillance
investors: Sure Valley Ventures, Midwich Ignite, Focal
thesis: FortifAI platform for drones, counter-UAS, surveillance. MOD & Home Office contracts. NATO DIANA selected.

name: Orca.AI
description: Autonomous shipping navigation platform
investors: Brighton Park Capital, Ankona, OCV Partners
thesis: 1,200+ vessels booked. World's largest marine visual dataset (80M nautical miles). MSC, NYK, Seaspan customers.

name: Hypatos
description: Deep learning for financial document automation
investors: Blackfin Tech, UVC Partners, Framework Ventures
thesis: 99%+ automation rate. Gartner Challenger for IDP. Processing $103B in annual transactions.

name: Higgsfield
description: AI video reasoning engine for social media marketers
investors: Accel, GFT Ventures, Menlo Ventures, BroadLight Capital
thesis: $1.3B valuation, $200M ARR. Application-layer play integrating 3rd-party models. 11M+ users, 85% social media marketers. Founder ex-Snap GenAI lead.

name: Comand AI
description: AI-native command and control software for military operations
investors: Eurazeo, Frst, Kima Ventures, Expeditions Fund
thesis: Prevail platform for military C2. Pilot contracts with France and Germany. Team from Palantir, OpenAI, NATO. Expanding to UK defence.

name: Paid.ai
description: Results-based billing platform for the AI agent economy
investors: Lightspeed, Sequoia Capital, EQT Ventures, FUSE
thesis: Building billing infrastructure for AI agents with results-based pricing. Founded by Manny Medina (ex-Outreach, $4.4B valuation). $21.6M oversubscribed seed from Lightspeed.

name: Noxus
description: AI operating system for building and governing enterprise AI co-workers
investors: SFC Capital, Antler, Bynd VC, Caixa Capital
thesis: 20K+ agent executions monthly. On track to $1M ARR. Six-figure enterprise contracts within 6 months. 100% gross margins. Google Growth Program selected.

name: Neuracore
description: Unified cloud-native robot learning platform
investors: Earlybird Venture Capital
thesis: Replacing fragmented robotics stacks with unified platform. Founder is Imperial College professor of robot learning. 50+ organisations on platform. Clem Delangue (Hugging Face CEO) as angel.

name: SLNG
description: Global model-agnostic voice AI infrastructure platform
investors: Earlybird Venture Capital
thesis: Unified API for any STT/TTS/voice model. 1,000+ voices across 150+ languages from 14 labs. Compliance-first across 20+ regions. Co-founder ex-npm and Vercel.

name: Pillar
description: End-to-end AI security platform for enterprise AI applications
investors: Shield Capital, Golden Ventures, Ground Up Ventures
thesis: Maps all AI assets across organisations to secure from dev to production. Preparing for Series A. Veteran cybersecurity founding team with 10+ years experience.

name: Zinco
description: AI-powered back-office platform for SMBs — accounting, taxes, payroll, financing
investors: Calafia
thesis: AI-powered roll-up of accounting/tax firms. Acquired Berenguela (800+ clients, 35 employees) as first move. Founded by David Alonso Martínez (Morgan Stanley → Samaipata VC → Gopuff) and Álvaro Mato (6 years London finance). Backed by Calafia. Same vertical AI thesis as Accrual but SMB-focused and Europe-first

name: Glimpse
description: AI-powered deductions management for CPG brands
investors: 8VC, Y Combinator, Origin Ventures
thesis: 125+ CPG brands. AI agent reviewed 17K deductions in 24hrs, identifying $10M+ recoverable revenue. YC S20 batch. Oversubscribed Series A led by 8VC.

name: Granola
description: AI-powered meeting notes and productivity platform
thesis: AI meeting notes leader. $67M raised at Series B. Rapidly growing in the AI productivity space alongside Otter.ai and Fireflies.

name: Replit
description: AI-powered collaborative coding and deployment platform
thesis: AI-powered coding platform. $522M raised, $1.16B valuation. 30M+ users. Competing with Cursor and Lovable in AI-assisted development.

name: Isembard
description: Software-first precision manufacturing for reshoring critical industries
investors: Notion Capital, 201 Ventures, Basis Capital
thesis: MasonOS increases factory throughput 40-60%, lowers costs 30%. Franchise model for distributed manufacturing. Defence, aerospace, energy verticals. Notion Capital-led seed backed by UK NSSIF.

name: Nexthop AI
description: Next-generation AI networking infrastructure for hyperscalers
investors: Lightspeed, Kleiner Perkins, WestBridge Capital, Battery Ventures
thesis: Custom networking hardware at 1.6Tbps per port. Founder ex-Arista COO (17 years). Team from Google, Amazon. Targeting $75B Ethernet switching TAM by 2029.

name: SolveAI
description: AI platform enabling non-technical employees to build production-ready enterprise software
investors: GV (Google Ventures), Accel, Northzone, Mantic VC, NeverLift
thesis: Enterprise AI coding platform for non-developers to build IT-compliant apps in minutes. Founded by Steve Basher (ex-Palantir, 8 years). $45M Series A led by GV, $5M pre-seed led by Accel. Emerged from stealth Feb 2026 with 12-person team.

name: BeyondMath
description: World's largest foundational physics AI model for engineering-grade simulations
investors: Cambridge Innovation Capital, UP.Partners, Insight Partners, InMotion Ventures
thesis: Foundational physics AI delivering 1,000x performance improvement over traditional supercomputing. Customers inc. F1 teams, aerospace, automotive. $19M STRATA project with Honeywell. Co-founders ex-Google/eBay.

name: Paper
description: AI-native connected design canvas for teams shipping with agents
investors: Accel, Tiny, Guillermo Rauch
thesis: Connected canvas bridging design and code for teams using AI agents. HTML/CSS-native — designs export as real code with no translation layer. MCP integration lets any IDE agent (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot) sync design tokens and components bidirectionally. Founded by Agu Seguí. Positioned as 'Figma for the agentic era' — if AI agents are writing code, designers need a tool that speaks the same language. Backed by Accel and Guillermo Rauch (Vercel founder). Early but high-signal investor list

name: Burst
description: Healthcare fintech platform unlocking FSA/HSA spending for retailers post-purchase
investors: Pear VC, Rock Health Capital, Alumni Ventures
thesis: Post-purchase HSA/FSA reimbursement for retailers (formerly Float). 30% higher basket sizes, 42% retention lift. Founded by Stanford GSB '24 grads. PearX S24 cohort. Integrates via Shopify app or API.

name: Melotech
description: AI-generated music and video content platform
investors: Cherry Ventures, Speedinvest, GFC (Global Founders Capital)
thesis: 3B+ minutes consumed worldwide. Cherry Ventures, Speedinvest, GFC. Founded by Soheil Mirpour (ex-Rocket Internet board). Still in stealth

name: Fireworks
description: Enterprise AI inference platform for deploying and running LLMs at scale
investors: Lightspeed Venture Partners, Index Ventures, Evantic, Sequoia Capital, Benchmark, Nvidia, AMD
thesis: AI inference platform built by ex-PyTorch engineers. 10K+ customers processing 10T+ tokens daily. $4B valuation at Series C. GPU infrastructure play targeting enterprise AI workloads.

name: Listen Labs
description: AI-powered customer research platform automating interviews and insights
investors: Sequoia Capital, Ribbit Capital, Pear VC, Conviction, Evantic
thesis: AI-conducted customer interviews at scale. 15x annualized revenue growth to eight figures in 9 months. 1M+ AI interviews conducted. Microsoft, Robinhood, Perplexity as customers. $500M valuation.

name: Lovable
description: AI-powered platform for building production-ready web apps via natural language
investors: CapitalG, Menlo Ventures, NVentures (Nvidia), Salesforce Ventures, Khosla Ventures, DST Global, EQT Growth, Accel, Creandum, Evantic
thesis: Natural language to web app. Part of the AI code generation wave alongside Replit, Bolt, v0

name: n8n
description: AI-powered workflow automation and orchestration platform
investors: Accel, Meritech, Redpoint, Evantic, Sequoia, Highland Europe, NVentures (Nvidia), Felicis Ventures
thesis: Fair-code workflow automation with AI agents. $40M+ ARR, 6x user growth, 10x revenue growth. $2.5B valuation. Open-source community moat with enterprise conversion.

name: Nexos
description: AI orchestration platform for secure enterprise-wide AI adoption and governance
investors: Index Ventures, Evantic Capital, Creandum, Dig Ventures
thesis: All-in-one AI governance: security, observability, cost control. 'Switzerland for LLMs.' Founded by Nord Security co-founders (cybersecurity unicorn, $3B valuation). Angels inc. CEOs of Datadog, Klarna, Supercell, Wix.

name: ElevenLabs
description: Advanced AI voice synthesis and text-to-speech platform
investors: Sequoia Capital, Andreessen Horowitz, ICONIQ Growth, Lightspeed, Salesforce Ventures, Nvidia
thesis: Defining voice AI category. Used across media, gaming, accessibility. One of Europe's breakout AI companies

name: Haiqu
description: Hardware-aware quantum operating system unlocking near-term quantum computing applications
investors: Primary Venture Partners, Toyota Ventures, MaC Venture Capital, Alumni Ventures, Collaborative Fund
thesis: Quantum OS enabling 100x cost savings on complex workloads vs existing methods. Targeting finance, healthcare, aviation. $11M seed led by Primary Venture Partners. Co-founders from Stanford and Max Planck Society.

name: Synthesia
description: Enterprise AI video generation platform for personalised video at scale
investors: GV (Google Ventures), NVentures (Nvidia), Accel, Kleiner Perkins, NEA, Evantic, Hedosophia
thesis: European AI video leader. Enterprise-focused. Used by 50%+ of Fortune 100

name: Harvey
description: AI platform for legal professionals — research, contracts, document review
investors: Sequoia, Kleiner Perkins, a16z, Coatue, GV, OpenAI
thesis: The $8B category leader in legal AI. Sequoia-led from Series A. 50+ AmLaw 100 firms, $100M+ ARR. Sets the benchmark that Wexler competes against at earlier stage

name: Stacks
description: AI-powered financial close and accounting automation for enterprises
investors: Lightspeed, General Catalyst, EQT Ventures, S16VC
thesis: AI-native financial close platform. 30+ enterprise customers. 100K+ hours saved annually. Founded by Albert Malikov (ex-Uber, ex-Plaid). Targeting $100B Office of the CFO software market. Customers include Motorway, Cleo, Nivoda, Epidemic Sound

name: Flinn.ai
description: AI platform for medtech regulatory compliance
thesis: AI automating regulatory compliance for medical device companies

name: Profound
description: AI answer-engine optimization platform for enterprise marketers
investors: Lightspeed, Sequoia Capital, Kleiner Perkins, Evantic Capital, Saga VC, South Park Commons
thesis: AI answer-engine optimization for marketers. $1B valuation. 700+ enterprise customers including Target, Walmart, Figma, Ramp, MongoDB. 10% of Fortune 500. Building the marketing infrastructure for an internet where brand discovery is mediated by AI. Just launched Profound Agents for autonomous marketing workflows

name: Serval
description: AI-native ITSM platform replacing legacy service desk software
investors: Sequoia, Redpoint, Meritech, First Round, General Catalyst, Evantic
thesis: AI-native ITSM replacing ServiceNow. $1B valuation. Sequoia compared customer feedback to early ServiceNow. 500% revenue growth in 3 months. Expanding from IT into HR, Finance, Legal. Customers include Mercor, Clay, Perplexity, Together AI, Verkada. Automates 50%+ of IT tickets

name: Aurora
description: AI-powered premium lifestyle OS for high-performance founders and executives
investors: Boost Capital Partners, Koro Capital, Profluence VC, EQT Angel Fund, Founder of Cleo, Founder of Velocity Black, President of VistaJet US
thesis: AI lifestyle manager for post-exit founders and UHNW individuals. Proactive recommendations via calendar, health wearable, and geo-location integration. End-to-end booking. Chairman is Alex Macdonald, founder of Velocity Black (acquired by Capital One for $300M). Co-founder Jonah Lowenstein (ex-Lazard TMT, previously backed by Accel, 20VC, co-founder of Venmo). Aurelius Zwick named UK Young Entrepreneur of the Year. Members-only, application-based

name: Arda
description: AI platform for autonomous manufacturing and Western supply chain reshoring
investors: Founders Fund, Accel, Khosla Ventures, XYZ Venture Capital
thesis: AI + software platform for autonomous manufacturing. Video model analyses factory footage to train robots; software coordinates machines and humans across full production cycle from design to finished goods. Founded by Bob McGrew (former OpenAI Chief Research Officer, ex-Palantir) and Augustus Odena (inventor of technique underlying reasoning models). $700M valuation. Western reshoring play — making manufacturing economically viable outside China. Bridges AI and physical world at a moment when defence industrial base and supply chain sovereignty are top of government agendas
